title: Anyone here using AI for trading with a VPS?
author: EndlessKnight_154
selftext:
I’ve been experimenting with running AI signals and executing trades through a VPS so everything stays online 24/7. I’m trying to find the right balance between automation, stability, and control.

How are you guys setting it up? Are you running things locally or on a VPS? And how are you handling execution, risk, and monitoring without overcomplicating it?

comments.author: Jabba_au
comments.body: Hey mate happy to share my script. Dm me

replies.author: Gold-Aspect4838
replies.body: Hey can I also send a text
